data.body: f93a LANDED as Gerrit change 325 (stacked #1): eval code-review arm + code_review_* scorers + 4 eval specs (base/verify/tests/security) with dso-seeded no-fire+recall families incl. nit-framing + Rule-5 structural-grep baseline. Closed w/ signed completion-verifier (caught+fixed a missing Rule-5 case). Unblocked 1669,4b56,7c58,da25,da8a,f983. Local commit 177a196 on top of origin/main c83819a11. Next: 4b56.
